title: Upgrade Agent Factory to professional-grade onboarding and dossier generation
summary: Expanded onboarding and generation so each created agent includes advanced competency, quality, policy, escalation, and KPI guidance like an industry-level employee profile.
changes: Added advanced agent profile fields to the factory type and API payload handling.
Extended onboarding wizard with required professional calibration questions.
Strengthened generation gating so advanced fields are completed before create.
Reworked generated artifacts and reference sheet into a multi-page professional dossier.
Stored expanded metadata in reference sheet persistence for auditability.
risks: Longer onboarding flow increases time-to-create for quick prototype agents.
rollback: Revert expanded fields in AgentFactoryModal and route payload mapping.
Restore previous lightweight reference sheet template in agent-factory.ts.
